content.full_text:
California
Fair Political
Practices Commission

August 29, 1989


Amy Mittino
California Association of
Independent Business, Inc.
P. O. Box 1304
Ontario, CA  91762

Re:  Your Request for Advice
     Our File No. A-89-448

Dear Ms. Mittino:

     You have requested confirmation of telephone advice provided
to you on behalf of the California Association of Independent
Business, Inc. (CAIB) concerning the lobbying disclosure
provisions of the Political Reform Act (Government Code Sections
81000-91015).

     Your letter, dated July 21, 1989, correctly summarizes my
advice that CAIB should disclose on its lobbyist employer reports
(Form 635) 100 percent of the payments made each quarter to the
Association's full-time lobbyist, and 75 percent of its overhead
and other expenses.  A copy of your letter is enclosed for your
convenience.

     Please contact me at (916) 322-5662 if you have additional
questions.

                                        Sincerely,

                                        Kathryn E. Donovan
                                        General Counsel

                                        [illegible]
                                        By:  Carla J. Wardlow
                                             Assistemt Chief, Technical
                                             Assistance & Analysis Division

Enclosure




428 J Street, Suite 800 • P.O. Box 807 • Sacramento CA 95804-0807 • (916) 322-5660

STATE HEADQUARTERS
8137 MALACHITE
SUITE F
RANCHO CUCAMONGA, CA 91730

FPPC

JUL 26 2 42 PM '89

MAILING:
P.O. BOX 1762
ONTARIO, CA 91762
(71) 981-5912

[California State Capitol Building Image] CAIB

California Association of Independent Business, Inc.

MS. CARLA WARDLOW
ASSISTANT CHIEF
TECHNICAL ASSISTANCE AND ANALYSIS DIVISION,
F.P.P.C.
428 "J" STREET, SUITE #700
SACRAMENTO, CA. 95814

JULY 21, 1989

DEAR MS. WARDLOW,

AS PER OUR CONVERSATION ON JULY 20, 1989, I AM WRITING THIS
LETTER TO CONFIRM MY UNDERSTANDING OF HOW CAIB SHOULD FILE
OUR LOBBYIST EMPLOYER FORM #635.

AS I MENTIONED TO YOU OVER THE PHONE, CAIB IS AN INFORMATION
SERVICE FOR SMALL BUSINESS. SINCE THIS INFORMATION IS ALSO
USED IN OUR LOBBY EFFORT, AND BECAUSE WE HIRE A FULL TIME
LOBBYIST, WE WILL FILE AS YOU ADVISED IN THE FOLLOWING
MANNER:

ON THE LOBBYIST EMPLOYER FORM #635, SECTIONS IN QUESTION:

A.    100% OF IN HOUSE LOBBYIST WAGES AND REIMBURSED
      EXPENSES.

D.    75% OF OTHER PAYMENTS TO INFLUENCE.

PLEASE LET US KNOW IF THIS IS THE CORRECT WAY FOR US TO FILE.

THANK YOU,

Amy Muttino
AMY MUTTINO

California
Fair Political
Practices Commission


July 28, 1989


Amy Mittino
California Association of
Independent Business, Inc.
P.O. Box 1304
Ontario, CA  91762

Re:  Letter No. 89-448

Dear Ms. Mittino:

     We received your letter requesting confirmation of advice
under the Political Reform Act on July 26, 1989.  Your letter has
been assigned to our Technical Assistance and Analysis Division
for response.  If you have any questions, you may contact that
division directly at (916) 322-5662.

     If the letter is appropriate for confirmation without further
analysis, we will attempt to expedite our response.  A confirming
response will be released after it has gone through our approval
process.  If the letter is not appropriate for this treatment, the
staff person assigned to prepare the response will contact you
shortly to advise you.  In such cases, the normal analysis, review
and approval process will be followed.

     You should be aware that your letter and our response are
public records which may be disclosed to any interested person
upon receipt of a proper request for disclosure.

Sincerely,

[illegible]

Kathryn E. Donovan
General Counsel

KED:plh:confadvl


428 J Street, Suite 800  •  P.O. Box 807  •  Sacramento CA 95804-0807  •  (916) 322-5660
